entries_to_add_to_subsystems_json.area: StateLibrary UI primitives (panel, toast, active-snapshot features footer)
entries_to_add_to_subsystems_json.rationale: Generic, app-agnostic UI primitives keyed on the createStateLibrarySlice contract (StateSnapshot<T>, toastFieldKey, activeIdKey convention). The slice itself is covered by e09-camera-plugin, but these three render-layer components are not folded into that subsystem (camera plugin is just one consumer). Surfaced by followup q-061; not covered by e09 or any other audit slice. components/StateLibraryPanel.tsx lives under the app components root rather than engine/components/, but it is the same contract surface so it is included here (followup q-061 explicitly groups all three together).

entries_to_add_to_subsystems_json.area: GMT CameraManager: cameraSlice consumer of installStateLibrary + CameraManagerPanel + getDirectionName helper
entries_to_add_to_subsystems_json.rationale: GMT CameraManager subsystem (cameraSlice + CameraManagerPanel + logic + feature index) totalling 608 uncovered lines (310+154+128+16). Load-bearing install-order invariant: installGmtCameraSlice() must run before any render of CameraManagerPanel (cameraSlice.ts:20-22 header). Four-way cross-subsystem boundaries: (1) e09-camera-plugin (installStateLibrary<SavedCameraPayload> factory contract handoff), (2) g05-engine-gmt-features (DDFS CameraManagerFeature is intentionally a tab-only stub with empty params), (3) g04-navigation (sibling input layer, not this saved-camera library), (4) engine-gmt/topbar.tsx (menu: null opts out of auto-menu; Camera menu wired by hand). The 16-line index.ts is re-listed for completeness per followup q-062 recommendation; it was previously claimed by g05-engine-gmt-features as part of engine-gmt/features/camera_manager/* glob, so integration should flag the overlap for the orchestrator. Surfaced by followup q-062.
